text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Air Shakur gathers a variety of
data each day leading up to the Hopeful Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, get me a tape measure! I need take some
quick measurements.
choice_data_list: Right!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My triceps surae have grown 1.2 centimeters, but
no change in my gastrocnemius.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We'll measure them again every five minutes.
After they've returned to their original size, I'm
gonna pump them up again.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Five minutes after that, we'll check their size
difference again. Get ready.
choice_data_list: Got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And another time...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...That tab shows the biometric data received
from my devices. It allows you to monitor my stats
in real time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur installs her homemade measurement
app to my phone, and my eyes are immediately
attacked by the UI's violently bright colors.
choice_data_list: Did you make the design as well?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Got a problem with it?
choice_data_list:
It might be easier to read if the colors were
toned down a bit...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Shut it. UI isn't my specialty.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've managed to keep my lap times at a high
standard. Next, I'll work on collecting some
detailed cornering data, and come up with a way
to shorten my lap times even more.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Call out the values shown after each lap, and I'll
make the necessary adjustments.
choice_data_list: Got it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just call out the values in order. Nothing else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our data collection goes smoothly and her results
are drawing closer to the theoretical values
required to become a Double Crown champion.
Our preparations continue, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We don't even have seven centimeters of room to
spare. Maybe instead of runnin' your mouth, how
about you start runnin' your brain?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've still yet to uncover decisive data for her
future.
choice_data_list: (What is there I can do?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her data collection is nothing short of extensive.
If there's any data that could truly be useful to
her, it would have to be...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Emotion is an unstable variable, however, so it's
inefficient to convert into data.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If the issue is just efficiency... then the data itself
would still be useful, right? I just have to put in
the time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Ah, aren't you...
Ah, aren't you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Narita Top Road! Hi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road is in the year above Air Shakur.
She drew a lot of attention after winning the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You're looking awful serious. Is there something
on your mind?
choice_data_list: Ahaha, well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You can tell me about if you'd like. I might be
able to lend a hand!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Stop right there, Top Road!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: If anyone understands this trainer's anguish, it is I!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They've been enchanted by the very incarnation
of beauty—yours truly, T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So that's what happened! You're incredible,
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O, the winner of this year's Satsuki
Sho... She's a year above Shakur, like Narita Top
Road and Shakur's roommate, Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They've already experienced classic year's intense
trials and tribulations. They know what Shakur's
up for.
choice_data_list: You all know about races, right?
You all know about races, right?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But of course! As does anyone standing on the
grand stage of the Twinkle Series.
choice_data_list:
Do you also know about things that aren't
considered logical?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But of co—uh, come again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their stories might reveal "unquantifiable
influences"—useful data that Parcae hasn't
factored into Shakur's future!
choice_data_list: Do you mind if I ask you some questions?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I guess I still don't have enough data.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(My body is steadily growing stronger, and my
stats are rising as the simulation predicted. But...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(This is my limit. I can't envision myself overtaking
the predicted losses.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(But even knowing that, all I can do is keep going
forward. Even if I know the road ahead leads
directly into hell...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Let's change your destiny."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I don't need any tagalongs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask Air Shakur to meet me the following day,
and she shows up without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: I have a suggestion.
I have a suggestion.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Is that right? Let's hear it, then.
choice_data_list:
I gathered some data on unquantifiable
influences outside Parcae's calculation.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"How to turn people's expectation into strength."
...Was that Narita Top Road?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, having people who support me is
one of the most important things there is!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I want to live up to their expectations. I don't
want to let them down, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That kind of thinking gives me the strength to
persevere, even when the going gets tough.
Those expectations give me the strength to take
those final steps.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I felt so thankful for that at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the Kikuka Sho! Well, I'd seen her crying
during the Derby, so...

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan
text_block_list.text:
Before I knew it, I was cheering my head off at
the Kikuka Sho! I ended up shouting so hard, my
throat was sore for days after.

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan
text_block_list.text:
I guess everyone was probably feeling the same.
We knew she could win—no, more than that... We
wanted her to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Even though I was totally focused on the race, I
could still hear them cheering.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That became my strength. As I neared the finish
line, my heart was pounding and the other racers
were closing in on me. Honestly, it was incredibly
tough. But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Everyone's voices were propelling me forward!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I could've pushed through and won
without that support.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"I analyzed every race she competed in,
converting the progression of her lap times and
running tendencies into formulas for comparison.
In doing so..."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"The resulting data suggests that her speed in the
final spurt of the Kikuka Sho, where she believes
the cheers propelled her forward, was slightly
higher than in other races."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Based on the above, we can conclude that
emotional support from fans was indeed a factor
in Narita Top Road's victory at the Kikuka Sho."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. And what am I supposed to do with this?
choice_data_list: I thought it might be useful.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's useless to me. This only applies to Top Road.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's true that certain conditions can produce
results that surpass calculations.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But do you seriously think I can raise my potential with fan support?
choice_data_list: I think you might have the same capacity.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What capacity?
choice_data_list: For illogical growth.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Illogical...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me! Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: You know what I mean. Right?
You know what I mean. Right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...If the "influence" is so miniscule that it's within
the margin of error, what's to say it had an impact
at all?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
When I mentioned unquantifiable influences, I
meant clear statistic miracles—not rose-tinted
maybes.
choice_data_list: But this could be where your breakthrough lies.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I thought I told you before that adding things like
this to my calculations was inefficient.
choice_data_list: But the data is already there.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So what now? You're gonna run around chatting
to random people and compiling it?
choice_data_list:
Sure. I want you to include it in your
calculations.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I don't think it's gonna change anything.
choice_data_list:
But it might. It might change things by 0.01
centimeters.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe all the fractional little influences she's
been rounding out would add up.
choice_data_list:
You never know. The seven-centimeter gap
might be 6.99 centimeters tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh.
choice_data_list: (She laughed at me?!)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's some far-fetched logic. Even if the gap
shrinks, there's no guarantee it'll hit zero.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But... sure. I suppose you're not wrong.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'll give your data some consideration.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So that's what you've come up with, huh?
